subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, pure and fragrant leaf! The tidings of this fresh calamity have unleashed a tempest of sorrows and caused tears to flow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه طیبه زکیه اخبار مصیبت جدیده طوفان احزانرا مستولی نمود و دموع
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
